_notes: STARTER catalogue (Phase 195). Store method parameters + proxy keys, NEVER invented
absolute numbers in engine code. Sources, in legitimacy order: EDGE published
defaults -> ASHRAE 90.1-2022 / 62.1 -> CIBSE Guide F / TM54. Resolution proxies on
climate ZONE, not country. provenance is never 'certified'.
Project teams confirm/replace these per the EDGE app for the certified run.
CAR (Bangui) has no EDGE-app baseline shipped here â€” it resolves via the hot-humid 0A
office proxy row and the proxy log records the fallback. Capturing the official CAR
baseline is a DATA task (drop a country+0A+office row into the project override at
A null embodiedEnergyBaseline_mj_m2 means 'the EDGE app owns the certified materials %'.
Energy end-use intensities: cooling/fans/dhw are kWh/m2.yr; lighting/equipment are W/m2
(the annual estimator turns W/m2 into kWh via the load profile schedule hours).
